query:
UPDATE cluster_node
            SET is_leader    = true,
                leader_epoch = leader_epoch + 1,
                last_heartbeat = $2
            WHERE node_id = $1
              AND (
                  -- No current leader
                  NOT EXISTS (
                      SELECT 1 FROM cluster_node
                      WHERE is_leader = true AND last_heartbeat > $3
                  )
              )
